chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1678 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.28473/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.18484/2023 3. For order on office objection 4. For order on Misc. No.8324/2023 5. For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 25.08.2023, which is over two years ago. Vide order dated 25.08.2025, the petitioner was directed to come prepared on the next date of hearing, failing which the petition would be dismissed for non-prosecution. Despite the lapse of two years, the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, notwithstanding observations made in order dated 25.08.2025, the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
